g.title: **pkg/platform** Detects Flatpak/Snap sandbox environments on the host system
**internal/issue** Creates actionable errors with operation context and suggestions
**Go stdlib** Underlying CLI process execution for Docker/Podman commands
**External** Docker container engine binary on the host system
**External** Podman container engine binary (includes podman-remote fallback)
**Engine interface** 12-method lifecycle and execution contract: Name, Available, Version, Build, Run, InspectContainer, Create, Start, Exec, Remove, ImageExists, RemoveImage.
**CommandPreparer interface** Interactive adapter contract: BinaryPath, BuildRunArgs, PrepareRunCommand. Kept separate from Engine.
**LifecycleCoordinator interface** Serializes create/start/exec orchestration when lifecycle operations share engine-level run constraints.

**BaseCLIEngine struct** Shared implementation for CLI-based engines. Provides argument builders (BuildArgs, RunArgs, ExecArgs, CreateArgs, StartArgs, RemoveArgs, RemoveImageArgs) and command execution helpers. Owns inspect/create/start/exec operations and run/lifecycle serialization. Configured via functional options.
**DockerEngine struct** Embeds BaseCLIEngine. Implements Engine for Docker CLI. Created via NewDockerEngine().
**PodmanEngine struct** Embeds BaseCLIEngine. Implements Engine for Podman CLI. Adds SELinux volume labels (:z) and rootless --userns=keep-id injection. Created via NewPodmanEngine().

**SandboxAwareEngine struct (decorator)** Wraps any Engine for Flatpak/Snap sandboxes. Prepends flatpak-spawn --host or snap run to all container CLI commands so they execute on the host rather than inside the sandbox. Passes through when no sandbox is detected.

**Factory functions** NewEngine(preferredType) creates the preferred engine with fallback to the other. AutoDetectEngine() tries Podman first, then Docker. Both wrap the result with SandboxAwareEngine.
**ExecCommandFunc type** Injection point for exec.CommandContext. Allows test mocking of process execution.
**VolumeFormatFunc type** Formats volume mount strings. Podman uses this to add SELinux :z labels when SELinux is present on the host.
**RunArgsTransformer type** Post-processes run arguments. Podman uses this to inject --userns=keep-id for rootless compatibility.
**BuildOptions struct** Image build parameters: ContextDir, Dockerfile, Tag, BuildArgs, NoCache, Stdout, Stderr
**RunOptions struct** Container run parameters: Image, Command, WorkDir, Env, Volumes, Ports, Remove, Name, Stdin/Stdout/Stderr, Interactive, TTY, ExtraHosts
**RunResult struct** Execution result: ContainerID, ExitCode, Error
**CreateOptions struct** Persistent container creation parameters: Image, idle Command, WorkDir, Env, Labels, Volumes, Ports, Name, ExtraHosts
**CreateResult struct** Result of creating a container. Contains the created ContainerID.
**ContainerInfo struct** Inspect metadata: ContainerID, Name, Running, engine Status, Labels.
**Sentinel error** Returned when no container engine is found on the system
**Error struct** Wraps ErrNoEngineAvailable with engine name and reason details. Supports errors.Is() via Unwrap().
**pkg/platform** Detects Flatpak/Snap sandbox environments on the host system
**internal/issue** Creates actionable errors with operation context and suggestions
**Go stdlib** Underlying CLI process execution for Docker/Podman commands
**External** Docker container engine binary on the host system
**External** Podman container engine binary (includes podman-remote fallback)
**Engine interface** 12-method lifecycle and execution contract: Name, Available, Version, Build, Run, InspectContainer, Create, Start, Exec, Remove, ImageExists, RemoveImage.
**CommandPreparer interface** Interactive adapter contract: BinaryPath, BuildRunArgs, PrepareRunCommand. Kept separate from Engine.
**LifecycleCoordinator interface** Serializes create/start/exec orchestration when lifecycle operations share engine-level run constraints.

**BaseCLIEngine struct** Shared implementation for CLI-based engines. Provides argument builders (BuildArgs, RunArgs, ExecArgs, CreateArgs, StartArgs, RemoveArgs, RemoveImageArgs) and command execution helpers. Owns inspect/create/start/exec operations and run/lifecycle serialization. Configured via functional options.
**DockerEngine struct** Embeds BaseCLIEngine. Implements Engine for Docker CLI. Created via NewDockerEngine().
**PodmanEngine struct** Embeds BaseCLIEngine. Implements Engine for Podman CLI. Adds SELinux volume labels (:z) and rootless --userns=keep-id injection. Created via NewPodmanEngine().

**SandboxAwareEngine struct (decorator)** Wraps any Engine for Flatpak/Snap sandboxes. Prepends flatpak-spawn --host or snap run to all container CLI commands so they execute on the host rather than inside the sandbox. Passes through when no sandbox is detected.

**Factory functions** NewEngine(preferredType) creates the preferred engine with fallback to the other. AutoDetectEngine() tries Podman first, then Docker. Both wrap the result with SandboxAwareEngine.
**ExecCommandFunc type** Injection point for exec.CommandContext. Allows test mocking of process execution.
**VolumeFormatFunc type** Formats volume mount strings. Podman uses this to add SELinux :z labels when SELinux is present on the host.
**RunArgsTransformer type** Post-processes run arguments. Podman uses this to inject --userns=keep-id for rootless compatibility.
**BuildOptions struct** Image build parameters: ContextDir, Dockerfile, Tag, BuildArgs, NoCache, Stdout, Stderr
**RunOptions struct** Container run parameters: Image, Command, WorkDir, Env, Volumes, Ports, Remove, Name, Stdin/Stdout/Stderr, Interactive, TTY, ExtraHosts
**RunResult struct** Execution result: ContainerID, ExitCode, Error
**CreateOptions struct** Persistent container creation parameters: Image, idle Command, WorkDir, Env, Labels, Volumes, Ports, Name, ExtraHosts
**CreateResult struct** Result of creating a container. Contains the created ContainerID.
**ContainerInfo struct** Inspect metadata: ContainerID, Name, Running, engine Status, Labels.
**Sentinel error** Returned when no container engine is found on the system
**Error struct** Wraps ErrNoEngineAvailable with engine name and reason details. Supports errors.Is() via Unwrap().
